markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on creating a content database for Homebase's blog articles and plan next steps for content creation and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [A comprehensive content database was created by scraping Homebase's existing blog articles and enriching with metadata like titles, descriptions, keywords, content bodies etc.](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [This database will enable automating various content workflows like analysis, optimization, refreshing etc.](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Decisions were made on categorizing keywords for creating new content vs refreshing existing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [The process for publishing new content, handling images/media, and the CMS migration plan were discussed.](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)

## Topics

### Content Database Creation

  - [Scraped Homebase's sitemap to extract article URLs, metadata, and content bodies](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Enriched with SEO data like meta titles, descriptions, keywords etc. using tools like SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Classified articles into funnel stages, identified opportunities for refreshing outdated content](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Built capabilities to analyze content quality, originality, fact-checking etc.](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Demonstrated potential use cases like auto-generating content, insights and constructive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)

### Keyword Analysis

  - [Reviewed the categorization of keywords into ones for creating new pages vs refreshing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [For keywords exactly matching existing URLs but with poor rankings, decided to do full rewrites instead of new pages](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Discussed grouping related keywords into sections like "Payroll Questions Hub"](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Plan to analyze high-converting existing content to identify more keyword opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

### Publishing Process

  - [Discussed handling images - using stock libraries, creating visual assets, product screenshots etc.](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)
  - [Planned to record a walkthrough of the WordPress publishing process and CMS capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=2584.0)
  - [Noted the upcoming CMS migration to Webflow and need to plan accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize documentation on content quality assurance process](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=2693.0)
  - [Set up a meeting to review WordPress publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=2584.0)
  - [Explore options for automating detection of outdated content](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Analyze top-performing existing content for new keyword targets](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Prepare sample content for publishing walkthrough](https://fathom.video/share/EH6mq-PM2s9xc85XmfFRjshdvV_A-NNy?tab=summary&timestamp=2835.0)
